nodes.label: Cloudflare Pages Deployment
nodes.rationale: Cloudflare Pages rebuilds the site automatically on every git push to main; the build command `pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdocs build --strict` mirrors the local strict check so broken links fail the deploy instead of shipping silently.

nodes.label: Note Authoring Workflow
nodes.rationale: Frontmatter fields (tags, summary, section_label, date) are all optional by design: missing summary falls back to the first paragraph, missing section_label to the section name, missing date to the last git commit date — so a note appears in the homepage Latest Notes block automatically without mandatory metadata.

nodes.label: Latest Notes Block ({{ LATEST_NOTES }} / {{ LATEST_NOTE_URL }} placeholders)
nodes.rationale: Homepage keeps a log-style Latest Notes section driven by template placeholders instead of hand-maintained links, so new notes surface automatically at build time.
nodes.norm_label: latest notes block ({{ latest_notes }} / {{ latest_note_url }} placeholders)

nodes.label: Deferred one-time command execution in Linux with at
nodes.norm_label: deferred one-time command execution in linux with at

nodes.label: at / atd one-time job scheduler
nodes.rationale: at runs a command once at a specified time (unlike cron's recurrence); jobs execute as the creating user without interactive sudo password entry, so the user must already have the required permissions (e.g. docker access).

nodes.label: Disk full but du finds no large files (deleted-but-open files)
nodes.norm_label: disk full but du finds no large files (deleted-but-open files)

nodes.label: lsof +L1 diagnostics for deleted-but-open files
nodes.rationale: Disk space of a deleted file is only released when the process holding its file descriptor closes it or exits; hence df/du divergence is diagnosed via lsof +L1 or /proc/*/fd, and prevented with logrotate plus 80%+ disk alerts in Zabbix/Prometheus.

nodes.label: Asterisk queue agent diagnostics and management
nodes.norm_label: asterisk queue agent diagnostics and management

nodes.label: state_interface hint for Asterisk agent state tracking
nodes.rationale: Asterisk uses the extension's hint (state_interface hint:1219@ext-local) to track agent state; without a correct state_interface the agent status (Not in use / In use / Busy / Unavailable) is determined incorrectly and calls may not route.
nodes.norm_label: state_interface hint for asterisk agent state tracking

nodes.label: SIP / PJSIP registration status check
nodes.rationale: An Unavailable agent status usually traces to the device, not the queue entry: sip show peers (chan_sip) or pjsip show endpoints (PJSIP) distinguishes OK vs UNKNOWN vs Unspecified registration states.

nodes.label: Diffie-Hellman group mapping: MikroTik vs Juniper SSG
nodes.norm_label: diffie-hellman group mapping: mikrotik vs juniper ssg

nodes.label: Diffie-Hellman group naming (Group N vs modpXXXX/ecpXXX)
nodes.rationale: Juniper SSG/ScreenOS names DH groups by number (Group 14) while MikroTik RouterOS uses MODP/ECP key-size names (modp2048); the naming mismatch makes it easy to pick different DH groups on the two VPN ends, breaking IKE negotiation. Phase 1 (profile dh-group) and Phase 2 PFS (proposal pfs-group) are configured separately and must both match.
nodes.norm_label: diffie-hellman group naming (group n vs modpxxxx/ecpxxx)

nodes.label: DCOM setup for Microsoft Excel Application (1C)
nodes.norm_label: dcom setup for microsoft excel application (1c)

nodes.label: DCOM Launch/Activation and Access permissions for Excel automation
nodes.rationale: Excel automation from the 1C service fails without: the 32-bit DCOM snap-in (mmc comexp.msc /32) exposing the component, the HKCR\AppID\EXCEL.EXE registry key with CLSID {00020812-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}, Local Launch/Activation and Local Access granted to the 1C service account, and existing systemprofile Desktop folders in System32 and SysWOW64 with Full Control.
nodes.norm_label: dcom launch/activation and access permissions for excel automation

nodes.label: Strict build mode (strict: true)
nodes.rationale: strict: true makes broken links and other warnings fail the build rather than silently reaching production; a note missing from nav or a dead link will drop the Cloudflare deploy.

nodes.label: Exactly pinned Python dependencies (pip freeze)
nodes.rationale: All dependencies are pinned exactly via pip freeze so the Cloudflare Pages build is reproducible and cannot break from a surprise transitive package update; upgrades are done by bumping mkdocs-material in a clean venv and re-freezing.
